overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt jogging through a dense coniferous forest toward a waterfall. The character navigates rocky terrain, crosses a wooden bridge, and wades into the pool at the base of the falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coniferous forest with mountain views

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along a grassy forest path with weapons strapped to back

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain visible through the trees in the distance
dense pine and spruce trees surrounding the path
worn dirt trail with green grass and wildflowers
large gray boulders scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open pine forest with a distant mountain peak visible ahead. Sunlight filters through the canopy onto the grassy trail, creating a serene woodland atmosphere with scattered rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with rocky terrain and stream crossings

events.description: terrain becomes significantly rockier with exposed stone and roots
large waterfall becomes visible through the trees in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating uneven rocky terrain and crossing small streams while moving deeper into the forest

entered.detail: large decaying tree trunk lying across the ground with exposed branches
narrow flowing waterway cutting through the forest floor
tall waterfall visible through gaps in the trees at the end of the path

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes denser and more enclosed as the character navigates rocky terrain and crosses small streams. A fallen dead tree lies beside the path, and toward the end of the segment, a large waterfall becomes visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall basin with rocky cliffs and river

events.description: crossing wooden footbridge over the rushing river
entering the water at the base of the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall, crossing the wooden bridge, and wading into the pool at the base

entered.detail: tall cascading waterfall flowing down rocky cliffs into the pool below
rustic wooden bridge spanning the river near the waterfall
steep gray stone walls surrounding the waterfall basin
deep pool with churning white water at the base of the falls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a dramatic waterfall basin. After crossing a wooden footbridge over the river, the character descends into the water at the base of the falls, surrounded by steep rocky cliffs and mist from the cascading water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene pine forest that gradually transforms into a dramatic waterfall basin. It begins on a grassy trail under a filtered canopy of sunlight, moving past rocky outcrops with a distant mountain peak visible ahead. As the forest becomes denser and more enclosed, the camera navigates rocky terrain and small streams, passing a fallen dead tree before a large waterfall emerges through the trees. The scene then opens as the character exits the woods and crosses a wooden footbridge over a river, finally descending into the mist-shrouded water at the base of the falls surrounded by steep rocky cliffs.
